title.en: As soon as they fought, Ye Tian estimated the s...

content.en:
Bang!!!!

Some Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Monsters appeared, directly killing the Lord of the Ruins.

And Ye Tian was also targeted by an ancient monster of the Bone Transformation Realm, and the other party killed him directly.

Bang!

As soon as they fought, Ye Tian estimated the strength of the other party.

Ordinary secondary bone transformation realm!

"Weak chicken!"

Ye Tian commented.

"Ancient God Demon Spear!"

Ye Tian's blow pierced through the opponent's body, directly hitting the opponent hard.

After another blow, this Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Monster was killed by him.

But soon, two more Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Monsters surrounded and killed Xiang Ye Tian.

This time, these two Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Monsters were powerful, and they were comparable to the existence of the four Bone Transformation Realms.

Although Ye Tian could crush them, he couldn't kill them in a short period of time.

Moreover, there are also a large number of primeval monsters that interfere with it, and they don't want to die just to consume his strength.

Ye Tian didn't feel much pressure, but it would be troublesome for the territorial sea boundary to crack those weak bone transformation realms.

No, the existence of a one-time bone transformation realm was directly and heavily damaged, and then surrounded by a group of primeval monsters, but it couldn't defeat these primeval demons of the nine-time blood transformation realm, and the injuries continued to worsen.

Burst!

This Bone Transformation Realm was attacked by an Ancient Monster of the Bone Transformation Realm, and was killed in an instant.

This is also the first bone transformation realm to fall on this side of the territorial sea boundary seam.

......

"Lord of Endless, save me!"

The Lord of Darkness has called for help.

At this moment, one of the Dark Lord's arms had completely disappeared, and with the strength of his bone transformation realm, he couldn't recover quickly, and even if he recovered, it was just an arm with no strength, and it was meaningless.

Moreover, he was severely injured with multiple holes all over his body.

The primeval monsters he encountered were too powerful for him to defeat them even if he tried his best.

If no one came to save him, he would have fallen.

He tried to escape, but the primeval monster wouldn't let him go.

Just as he was about to fall, a spear directly pierced through this bone transformation realm primeval monster, killing the other party in an instant.

"Endless Lord !!"

The Lord of Darkness was thrilled.

The Endless Lord has really come to his rescue.

Moreover, the strength of the Endless Lord shocked him, and with a single spear, he instantly killed an ancient monster that was almost invincible in the Three Bone Transformation Realm.

"That spear just ......"

Although the Lord of Darkness had not practiced the Ancient Technique, he also knew that the Ancient Technique that Ye Tian had cast was not ordinary, and the power contained in it was too terrifying.

This is definitely not an ordinary primeval technique!

"Could it be the top primeval art?"

The Lord of Darkness guesses.

If it was a top-notch primeval technique, it would not be surprising that it had such power.

But in such a short period of time, Ye Tian was able to practice the top ancient technique, this is too demonic!

Anyway, he hadn't heard of any bone transformation realm who had cultivated the top primeval technique.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian asked the Lord of Darkness to leave.

In his current state, the Lord of Darkness can't fight at all, so he continues to stay here and seek death.

"Thank you, Lord of the Infinite!"

The Lord of Darkness fled immediately.

And Ye Tian covered it up and successfully let the Lord of Darkness leave.

In the beginning.

The Bone Transformation Realm of the Territorial Sea Boundary Gap could still hold up, but as more and more Ancient Monster Bone Transformation Realms poured in, they couldn't hold it.

In terms of the number of bone transformation realms, the Ancient Demon Abyss is undoubtedly more.

In fact.

There were also a lot of bone transformation realms in the Hunhe Boundary Seam at the beginning, but only a small half of the Hunhe Boundary Rift was integrated into the Territorial Sea Boundary Seam, and the number of bone transformation realms in the Territorial Sea Boundary Rift itself was not much, so it couldn't compete with the bone transformation realm of the Ancient Demon Abyss.

"Ancient monsters are not very intelligent, so there's no need to fight them!

The Lord of the Ruins said.

"Then let's leave first!"

The Lord of the Void agreed.

If the Armageddon really takes place here, I'm afraid I'll have to fight all the bone transformation realms.

"Lord of Haiyang, you can run away too!"

Before leaving, the Lord of the Void reminded.

"You ......"

The Lord of Haiyang was extremely angry, he knew that he was going to escape, so he would transfer his people first!

But now that he is temporarily escaping, how can he transfer?

The speed of those Blood Transformation Realm people is very slow, and they can't escape at all!

......

The Blood Transformation Realm of the Terran intercepted the primeval monsters on the edge of the battlefield, and Ye Tian rushed here and took all these Terrans away with a wave of his hand.

He also escaped!

After all, the other Bone Transformation Realms were ready to give up here, so naturally he wouldn't stay.

Otherwise, it doesn't matter if his replica body falls, these blood transformation realms of the human race will not be saved!

The Lord of Haiyang naturally fled, but he could only take some of the core clansmen with him.

After all, the territory of the Taikohai Clan was too big, and the clansmen were scattered everywhere, and he didn't have time to transfer these clansmen away, so he could only give up ruthlessly.

It didn't take long for the territory of the Ancient Sea Clan to be occupied by the Ancient Monsters.

Subsequently, the primeval monsters divided into teams to take over the territory.

However, after all, the intelligence of the primeval monster is low, and a bone transformation realm in the territorial sea boundary has thought of various strategies to deal with the ancient monster, such as locking the position of an ancient monster in the bone transformation realm, and several top bone transformation realms launched an attack and kill, directly killing the other party.

Of course.

There are also top overlord-level forces who are unlucky and are targeted by the primeval monsters, resulting in the direct attack on the headquarters.

But as time goes by, the primeval monsters will definitely still be defeated.

However, one of the events of this day made many practitioners change their complexions.

......

Territorial waters of Takizawa.

This is also a territorial sea that is not too big or small, and there are many cultivators living in it.

Although this territorial sea did not give birth to the Bone Transformation Realm, nor did it have many Blood Transformation Realms, the most powerful Blood Transformation Realm had also reached eight Blood Transformation Realms, and he was a boundary-breaking genius, so he also had a certain reputation in the Territorial Sea Boundary Gap.

On this day, a group of primeval monsters arrived here.

The cultivators of the territorial waters of Longze were hiding in the territorial waters and trembling, and they couldn't rush out to fight this group of primeval monsters, because they knew that they couldn't kill them.

The Eight Blood Transformation Realm Breaking Geniuses in Longze's territorial waters, the Dust Sea Heavenly Ancestor, were also very nervous at this time.

"If this group of primeval monsters rushes in, their strength will be suppressed, and we are not hopeless!"

He thought.

Suddenly.

An incomparably large and ugly-looking primeval monster lay on top of Longze's territorial waters, opened its huge mouth, and continued to devour Longze's territorial waters.

The number of these primeval monsters is quite large, about hundreds.

At this time, the origin of Longze's territorial waters was swallowed up little by little by these special primeval monsters, and the origin of Longze's territorial waters became weaker and weaker, and the barriers of the territorial waters were constantly cracking.

Seeing this scene, the face of the Dust Sea Heavenly Ancestor changed drastically.

In desperation, he could only ask for help from other forces, and explained the situation here.

After all, the territorial sea has always been a strong fortress for cultivators, but now this fortress will be easily broken, which is definitely a disaster for cultivators!
